allow: PowerShell(cd "D:\\dist"; $p = Start-Process -FilePath ".\\trocr_server.exe" -WorkingDirectory "D:\\dist" -RedirectStandardError "D:\\dist\\err.txt" -RedirectStandardOutput "D:\\dist\\out.txt" -NoNewWindow -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $p.HasExited; if \($p.HasExited\) { "Exit code: $\($p.ExitCode\)"; Get-Content "D:\\dist\\err.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Content "D:\\dist\\out.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } else { "Still running \(good\)"; $p.Kill\(\) })

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("D:\\dist\\trocr_server.exe"\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); $idx = $text.IndexOf\('/predict'\); if \($idx -ge 0\) { $text.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0,$idx-50\), 150\) } else { "not found" }; $idx2 = $text.IndexOf\('/ocr'\); if \($idx2 -ge 0\) { $text.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0,$idx2-50\), 150\) } else { "not found" })
